# Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct

## Our Commitment

We are committed to providing a welcoming and inspiring community for all. We expect everyone who participates in our project to uphold these values.

## Our Standards

Examples of behavior that contributes to creating a positive environment include:

- **Being respectful** - Listen to different viewpoints and experiences
- **Being inclusive** - Welcome people of all backgrounds and perspectives
- **Being constructive** - Provide helpful feedback and assume good intent
- **Being collaborative** - Work together toward shared goals
- **Being professional** - Keep interactions appropriate and professional

Examples of unacceptable behavior include:

- Harassment, discrimination, or intimidation of any kind
- Offensive comments related to gender, sexual orientation, ability, ethnicity, religion, or identity
- Trolling, insulting, or derogatory comments
- Personal attacks or disputes
- Publishing private information without consent
- Other conduct that would be inappropriate in a professional setting

## Scope

This Code of Conduct applies to:
- All project spaces (issues, pull requests, discussions)
- Interactions between community members
- Public representations of the project and community

## Enforcement

Instances of unacceptable behavior may be reported by contacting:

**Email**: m.ssaid356@gmail.com

All reports will be reviewed and investigated promptly. All community members are expected to comply with this Code of Conduct.

Depending on the severity of violations, actions may include:
- Warning or request for clarification
- Temporary or permanent removal from project spaces
- Escalation to appropriate authorities if necessary

## Attribution

This Code of Conduct is adapted from the [Contributor Covenant](https://www.contributor-covenant.org/), version 2.1, available at https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct.html.

## Questions?

If you have questions about this Code of Conduct, please feel free to contact us.

---

Thank you for being part of our community and helping maintain a respectful, inclusive environment! 💙
